refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.
DP2: Task scheduling and dispatch system integrated with equipment telemetry.
DP3: Real-time productivity monitoring dashboard with alerting.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.

potential_sources: Interaction between control algorithms and task scheduling
Data dependencies between monitoring and control
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically separable but requires well-defined interfaces with task scheduling and monitoring to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate telemetry data for control optimization.
Risk that control algorithm complexity may impact real-time responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing control and scheduling to reduce coupling and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and embedded control systems responsible for equipment operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Bi-directional data exchange for real-time equipment status and control commands.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives scheduled tasks and operational directives from higher-level systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope; contains multiple functions but less focused on embedded control.
High containment of control logic; minimal diffusion outside vehicle boundaries.
Primarily remote control; less relevant for embedded control algorithms.
Focused on safety alerts; minimal involvement in productivity control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Embedding adaptive control algorithms within the Vehicle module centralizes operational logic, minimizing interface complexity and diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential tight coupling with task scheduling if interfaces are not well defined.
Risk of overloading Vehicle module with complex control logic impacting maintainability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules to manage control and tasking interactions.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive control algorithms) logically satisfies the refined FR of optimizing equipment operation to meet productivity targets.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion of control logic if task scheduling is not properly modularized.
Interface complexity between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for control logic, minimizing diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics during operation and validating control response via telemetry.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control DP to Vehicle IM with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Consider modularizing task scheduling separately to reduce coupling.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, interface definitions and coupling risks require refinement before proceeding to next level.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and assign tasks to equipment to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

revise.why: To clarify and strengthen interface definitions and reduce coupling risks between Vehicle and other modules.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely.
Vehicle module can support embedded control logic complexity.
open_risks: Interface complexity leading to diffusion of control logic.
Potential performance impact of control algorithms on Vehicle systems.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of control algorithms in Vehicle module.
